Requirement Statement: The Bank shall maintain an enterprise technology policy framework that governs technology strategy architecture standards requirements controls evidence and exceptions.
The Bank shall maintain an Enterprise Architecture operating model with defined capabilities roles responsibilities and decision rights.
The Bank shall require Architecture Review Board review and decisioning before implementation of material technology change.
The Bank shall maintain an architecture repository for approved standards patterns principles decisions and evidence.
The Bank shall map material technology solutions to business capabilities services applications and technology services.
The Bank shall maintain an application portfolio with lifecycle state ownership criticality business capability mapping and technical debt indicators.
The Bank shall govern technology lifecycle health including end-of-life end-of-support obsolescence remediation and exception handling.
The Bank shall require cloud platform architecture to comply with approved landing zone security resilience data and cost management patterns.
The Bank shall require infrastructure and network architecture to support segmentation resilience scalability observability and recoverability requirements.
The Bank shall require secure-by-design architecture including threat modeling IAM encryption data protection and privacy-by-design for material changes.
The Bank shall govern APIs and integrations as reusable products with defined ownership contracts security standards versioning and observability.
The Bank shall require DevSecOps pipeline controls including secure code scanning dependency scanning secrets management testing and approval gates.
The Bank shall require operational resilience architecture including dependency mapping recovery objectives failover design backup and continuity alignment.
Regulatory Mapping: FFIEC; Federal Reserve operational resilience; NIST

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require third-party technology architecture review before procurement implementation renewal or material expansion.
Evidence Source: Vendor architecture review and TPRM evidence

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall require AI and emerging technology use cases to complete architecture risk model risk data security and operational readiness review before production use.
Regulatory Mapping: NIST AI RMF; Model Risk Management; FFIEC

Requirement Statement: The Bank shall maintain exception and waiver governance with defined approval authority compensating controls expiration and renewal review.
